title: sternbergia lutea subsp. graeca
intro: Sternbergia lutea subsp. graeca is a subspecies of the Sternbergia lutea plant, also known as the Autumn Nectar or Golden Sternbergia, a type of flowering bulbous perennial native to Greece. Traditionally, Sternbergia lutea subsp. graeca has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and has been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Sternbergia lutea subsp. graeca is often used in the form of infusions or decoctions, and its bulb is also used in traditional medicine to prepare tinctures and other medicinal products.
